label: Demo Start
description:
First available data export.

The BitCraft Online Demo first started on May 29th (the Playtest/stress test was on May 16th), but no data exports exist for earlier versions to my knowledge.
Steam post: https://store.steampowered.com/news/app/3454650/view/537729347429073577

label: Demo End
description:
Last version during the BitCraft Online Demo.

The demo was actually extended one more day to the 17th, but data wasn't changed.

label: 1.00 - EA1 Start
description:
First available data export for Early Access 1.

The first version of Early Access was released on June 21st, but technical issues and changes delayed data exports for a few days.
Steam post: https://steamcommunity.com/games/3454650/announcements/detail/537731249563763089

label: 1.01 - WASD, Claim Supply Balance
description:
The first weekly update for Early Access.

A status update was posted on the website, and a preview build was released on Steam introducing WASD controls.
BitCraft news: https://bitcraftonline.com/news/early-access-week-2
Steam post: https://steamcommunity.com/games/3454650/announcements/detail/537731883551689643
Patch notes: https://discord.com/channels/558439686083969035/879663330657206332/1390050681557221539

Note: Version 1.02 is missing after this. It's possible they internally counted pushing the preview build to main as 1.02 due to some small changes.
Discord announcement: https://discord.com/channels/558439686083969035/1260246406963134496/1390410719379329165

Weekly update. Banks deconstructable again, settlement minimum range added.

A preview client went out on the 8th, server changes arrived on the 9th along with a Discord announcement. Main Steam build and announcement went out on the 10th.
Discord announcement: https://discord.com/channels/558439686083969035/879663330657206332/1392539589645959279
Discord patch notes: https://discord.com/channels/558439686083969035/1260246406963134496/1392539315233620048
